summary: The graph contains 82 nodes and about 240 directed edges with low density (~0.036) and is largely a single connected component centered on core application modules. Most nodes are source files (controllers, services, models, routes, utils/types/templates); major hubs with high in-degree are src/app.ts, src/utils/consts.ts, src/config/config.ts, src/config/database.ts and src/utils/logger.ts, while a couple of type-only files (e.g., src/types/autochat.types.ts) have few or no incoming links. Edges are almost entirely import relationships (directed) linking routes → controllers → services → models/utilities, plus entrypoints and test files importing the app and config. The structure shows a hub-and-spoke pattern around app and consts, layered linear chains through the service/model stack, and no large circular-dependency clusters—indicating a modular architecture with tight coupling around shared config/consts and core models (notably User and the DB).
